channel.title: kelseycookcomedy
channel.description: MARK YOUR TERRITORY out now on Hulu & YouTube! Come see me on tour! Tix👇🏻🎫

item.title: What a year! 🥳 The Happy Hour Tour was my favorite year perfo...
item.description:
What a year! 🥳 The Happy Hour Tour was my favorite year performing so far. Thank you to everyone who came to see me on the road and to everyone who watched my special Mark Your Territory. I’m so excited to start my new Reasonable Bedtime Tour next month! (and also so excited to curl up with my pets and try to do as little as possible until then 😂) Wishing you all a fantastic New Year!
#2025recap #2025 #newyear #yearinreview #standupcomedy
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
